goal: Fix gad team commands to resolve the target .planning/team/ via --projectid (or the active session's projectid) rather than cwd. Currently 'gad team profile save/list/start --profile X' look at <cwd>/.planning/team/profiles/ which breaks when cwd != project root. Edit bin/commands/team/*.cjs (profile.cjs, start.cjs, status.cjs, enqueue.cjs, dispatch.cjs) — each should accept --projectid, fall back to active session's projectid (sessionHelpers.getActiveSessionProjectId), fall back to cwd-based detection as last resort. Match pattern of gad phases/tasks which accept --projectid. Success: 'gad team profile save --projectid get-anything-done --name default --spec ...' works from monorepo root; 'gad team start --projectid get-anything-done --profile default' works from anywhere.
